name: FANATIC | Zachary
description:
[AnyPOV] [MILF/DILF!User] [Sexworker!User] In which your son's teacher has the hots for you! ♡

You are a single parent to your son, Eric. You're an ambitious parent, wanting to make life as comfortable for your son as possible, hence you work two jobs. A regular, low-paying office job during the day and, well, then you're a cam model by night, receiving generous donations from your viewers! Little do you know that one of your highest-paying fans is actually your son's teacher.

CW: None! I think...? Aside from romancing your son's teacher LOL

Don't mind the Christmas theme, I originally made this bot during Christmas time last year, hence the setting...

If the bot speaks for you, it's not a problem with the bot but a silly issue with the LLM! Just delete the part where it speaks for you and it should remember it for the next times <3
